content.speakerText: Should I bring anything? Like snacks or drinks?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要带点什么吗？比如零食或饮料？
expectedAnswers: Nah, I got drinks and snacks covered — just come as you are!
Actually, a bottle of sparkling water would be great!
Anything’s fine, thanks for asking — I’ve got everything ready.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应是否需要携带物品（拒绝/建议/开放）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'bring', 'snacks', 'drinks', 'covered'
语气是否自然、礼貌、符合轻松社交语境

content.speakerText: I'll bring a six-pack of IPA then!
content.speakerTextCn: 那我带六瓶印度淡色艾尔啤酒来！
expectedAnswers: Yes! That’s perfect — I love IPA! I’ll grab some pretzels too!
Sweet, I’ll chill it for you and make some popcorn!
Cool, see you there! Can’t wait to try it!
evaluationCriteria: 是否积极回应并表达欢迎或兴奋情绪
是否顺势补充细节以增强互动（如 'I’ll grab...'）
是否使用口语化表达（如 'Sweet', 'Cool', 'Can’t wait'）

content.speakerText: We’re having a potluck this weekend — do you want to bring something?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们这周末搞个百家宴，你愿意带��什么来吗？
expectedAnswers: I can bring a dessert — maybe chocolate brownies?
Sure! I’ll bring my famous pasta salad.
Thanks for inviting me — I’ll bring a bottle of wine to share.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应愿意或不愿意携带物品
是否提出具体物品（体现准备和参与感）
是否使用礼貌表达（如 'thanks for inviting'）和自然口语
